raw_response:
I concur entirely with the consensus reached here. Adding another layer of detail, while aspartame (NutraSweet) indeed offers zero net carbs and doesn't raise blood sugar levels, it also carries certain safety concerns which are worth noting—such as possible links to cancer risks according to some studies but widely disputed others. Nonetheless, these nuances do not change the fundamental fact that NutraSweet/Aspartame is unequivocally categorized as an artificial sweetener.

Therefore, my answer aligns perfectly with option B. Answer choice: B.
